author: Karel M.
pros: Criteria for finding junior developers can be low. As it is low code platform. For correct use case they are the best choice.
cons: As it is low code platform it can be hard to add function that is not present.

description: Very good; Open to new ideas; to negotiate;
author: Herschel Gordon N.
pros: Negotiable; Accessible; Willing to work together
cons: Not in country; Would be good to have technical teams on site (at times) although not critical

description: Great experience overall. The professional services team is great to work with and provide very good value for the cost with very good timely results
author: Bernardo A.
pros: it is a very scalable and reliable platform
cons: The cost of the agreement is getting higher

review_title: Digital Route solution above the competition
description: Dealing with a very professional and experienced team. Support has been excellent and our system has not had any major outage which is critical to our business
author: Willem G.
pros: Integration into network systems were seamless and without much effort
cons: Most of the features that was needed was provided a Few of the nice to have additions were a bit expensive for our market

author: Alexandru G.
pros: Easily can be prepared a flow to process any type of data
cons: Initially(for beginners) difficult to understand and customize

description: Digital route are a pleasure to deal with. They are very engaging and have a team of excellent solution architects, project managers and customer support
author: David C.
pros: Digital Route are a very good organization with its innovative solutions and dedication to customer satisfaction. They have a user centric and solution lead approach to dealing with their customers and in a rapidly evolving tech landscape, Digital Route standout as a leading vendor in the Mediation space
cons: While Digital Route certainly has numerous positive aspects, there are some negative points. Primarily this is around the licensing of optional features. While the product has a lot of core features, for optional features there is an extra cost.

description: Digital Route Team are innovators and world leaders in Data Mediation, they have been keeping up pace with latest technology trends and also embracing open source protocols. Partnership with Digital Route allows us to launch services frequently
author: Manish G.
pros: Zero down time architecture, Plugins support and extensibility of the product through Development Tool Kit comes as big boost to tailor and launch new integrations. Though lately they have brought the support for various open-source technology trends such as Avro and protobuf.
cons: Customer service area & openness to customer voice is concern. Another area is documentation, lately there have been good improvements, however we still feel they need to make technical parameters open to configure and clearly document the defaults.

review_title: Long Term User of Mediation Zone
description: Very positive - we have been MZ users for many years and have changed both networks and Billing Systems many times but retained MZ. We have updated MZ several times without significant issues.
author: James M.
pros: The Mediation Zone product is reliable.MZ support respond to questions, bugs and issues.
cons: It can be quite a daunting tool for non-technical users to understand.

review_title: IT billing review of the Mediation Zone application
description: Overall satisfied for the billing processes as well as other features like data collection, distribution and aggregation
author: Ivan T.
pros: Automation capabilities, HA features, easy to use
cons: Some UI features, low to mid support level from support desk

review_title: Mediation Zone a great data processing tool beyond the Telcom and into Cloud era
author: Henri Y.
pros: - Batch ACID transaction safe - Compliant with Telcom standard 3GPP - Support most of IT protocols - Visual programming
cons: Version control is a lacking point so if you are many many projects / deployments in parallel, you may step on toes each other.

author: Thanon K.
pros: Based on my work position, I'm actually contact with DigitalRoute team in term of business requirement and solution. However, after these years, DigitalRoute teams always provides great supports.
cons: As my work position, I haven't seen product limitation yet.

review_title: MediationZone is a solid data mediation system
description: I like implementing solutions based on MediationZone - it saves a lot for time.
author: Grzegorz W.
pros: Proven technology, scales nicely, it is elastic and quite easy to learn.
cons: Not following the latest trends, problems with containerization and working in the cloud.

description: Easy platform to get the desired output.
author: Trupti A.
pros: Ease of commenting and exchanging the information code analysis
cons: Extra fields of information are required to fill
